Container.Name: TrimPoint
Container.Overview: Self-hosted position-ceiling tracker. Set a maximum weight (ceiling) for each holding; TrimPoint pulls live prices, shows where every position sits, and flags the ones over your line with the exact trim back to your floor. Optional notifications (ntfy/Discord/webhook) and daily history. Informational only - it executes the plan you set; it is not financial advice.

Config.Name: WebUI Port
Config.Description: Port for the TrimPoint web interface.

Config.Name: Finnhub API key
Config.Description: Free key from finnhub.io for live prices. Without it, prices stay at what you enter.

Config.Name: Password (optional)
Config.Description: Set to require a password to open TrimPoint. Leave blank for open access on your LAN.

Config.Name: Session secret
Config.Description: Random string (e.g. openssl rand -hex 32) so logins survive restarts. Only needed if you set a password.

Config.Name: Notify URL
Config.Description: ntfy topic URL, Discord webhook, or generic webhook to ping when a holding crosses its ceiling.

Config.Name: Cookie secure
Config.Description: Set true only if you reach TrimPoint over HTTPS (e.g. behind a reverse proxy).
